form_missing_title_validation.description: Project creation accepts empty title field
form_missing_title_validation.expected: Validation error shown when title is empty

form_accepts_invalid_email.description: Settings email field accepts invalid email format

form_submit_no_feedback.description: Task creation shows no success or error message
form_submit_no_feedback.expected: Success toast or confirmation message after creating task
form_submit_no_feedback.actual: Task is created but no visual feedback is shown

crud_edit_doesnt_save.description: Task edit appears to save but reverts on refresh
crud_edit_doesnt_save.actual: Edit response shows new values but database is unchanged; refresh shows old data

crud_delete_item_reappears.description: Deleted project still shows in list after refresh
crud_delete_item_reappears.actual: Delete returns success but project reappears on refresh

crud_create_duplicate_on_doubleclick.description: Double-clicking create button creates duplicate items
crud_create_duplicate_on_doubleclick.expected: Button is disabled after first click to prevent duplicates

search_no_results_state_missing.description: Empty search shows blank page instead of 'No results' message
search_no_results_state_missing.expected: Friendly 'No results found' message with suggestion to adjust filters
search_no_results_state_missing.actual: Blank white area with no indication of empty state

filter_resets_on_pagination.expected: Filters preserved when navigating between pages
filter_resets_on_pagination.actual: Clicking page 2 resets all filters and shows unfiltered results

search_doesnt_clear.description: Search term persists when navigating away and back
search_doesnt_clear.expected: Search field cleared when leaving the page
search_doesnt_clear.actual: Old search term still active, showing filtered results unexpectedly

wizard_back_loses_data.description: Going back in project wizard clears entered data
wizard_back_loses_data.expected: Previously entered data preserved when navigating back
wizard_back_loses_data.actual: All fields reset to empty when clicking Back button

wizard_wrong_step_indicator.description: Step indicator shows wrong step number
wizard_wrong_step_indicator.expected: Step indicator accurately reflects current step
wizard_wrong_step_indicator.actual: Shows 'Step 2 of 3' when actually on step 3

auth_session_not_cleared.expected: All auth tokens removed from localStorage and cookies on logout
auth_session_not_cleared.actual: Cookie cleared but localStorage token remains, allowing re-auth

auth_expired_no_redirect.description: Expired token shows broken dashboard instead of redirecting to login
auth_expired_no_redirect.expected: Automatic redirect to login page when token expires
auth_expired_no_redirect.actual: Dashboard loads with empty/broken state, no redirect

rbac_member_sees_admin.description: Non-admin users can access billing settings
rbac_member_sees_admin.expected: 403 error or redirect for non-admin users
rbac_member_sees_admin.actual: Billing page loads with full data for any authenticated user

rbac_delete_not_restricted.expected: Only admins can delete projects; members get 403
rbac_delete_not_restricted.actual: Delete succeeds for any authenticated user

share_success_but_no_effect.description: Invite shows success toast but member is not actually added
share_success_but_no_effect.expected: Member appears in team list after successful invite
share_success_but_no_effect.actual: Success message shown but member list unchanged after refresh

export_missing_columns.description: CSV export missing assignee and due_date columns
export_missing_columns.expected: All task fields included in export
export_missing_columns.actual: CSV has only ID, Title, Description, Status, Priority — missing Assignee and Due Date

error_generic_500_message.description: Generic 'Error 500' instead of helpful error message

loading_state_missing.description: No loading indicator while data loads
loading_state_missing.expected: Spinner or skeleton loader during API calls
loading_state_missing.actual: Content area is blank until data arrives

broken_nav_link.description: Reports link in navigation leads to 404

responsive_sidebar_overlap.description: Sidebar overlaps content on tablet viewport (768px)
responsive_sidebar_overlap.expected: Sidebar collapses or pushes content on smaller screens
responsive_sidebar_overlap.actual: Sidebar floats over page content at 768px width

responsive_table_overflow.description: Task table overflows horizontally on mobile
responsive_table_overflow.expected: Table is responsive or scrollable within container
responsive_table_overflow.actual: Table extends beyond viewport, causing horizontal scroll on entire page

responsive_button_too_small.description: Action buttons are too small on mobile (< 44px touch target)
responsive_button_too_small.expected: Minimum 44x44px touch targets per WCAG guidelines
responsive_button_too_small.actual: Buttons are 32x32px, difficult to tap on mobile

a11y_missing_form_labels.expected: All form inputs have associated <label> elements or aria-label
a11y_missing_form_labels.actual: Input fields use placeholder text only, no <label> elements

a11y_low_contrast.description: Light gray text on white background fails contrast ratio
a11y_low_contrast.expected: Minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text (WCAG AA)

img_missing_alt.expected: All images have descriptive alt text or empty alt for decorative images
img_missing_alt.actual: Image element has no alt attribute at all

img_oversized.description: Oversized image file for small thumbnail display
img_oversized.expected: Image sized appropriately for display dimensions
img_oversized.actual: 2MB PNG served for a 200px thumbnail area

perf_large_bundle.description: Unminified JavaScript bundle served in production
perf_large_bundle.actual: 800KB unminified JS file loaded on every page

security_no_csp.expected: CSP header present to prevent XSS and injection attacks

security_no_hsts.expected: HSTS header present to enforce HTTPS

seo_duplicate_h1.description: Multiple H1 tags on dashboard page
seo_duplicate_h1.actual: Two <h1> elements: page title and welcome message

console_unhandled_error.description: Unhandled promise rejection on task detail page
console_unhandled_error.expected: No console errors during normal usage
console_unhandled_error.actual: Uncaught SyntaxError: JSON.parse of invalid data in task labels

broken_external_link.expected: Link resolves to valid documentation page
